h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to struggle with the conflict between their intuition and the visual representation of the grid.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: The line has stopped settling it. It keeps making a strip look like the whole square. Start with the claim, not the answer. Use two tiles first.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor abandons the grid drawing and introduces physical tiles to break the learner's persistent intuitive block.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.
